title: WS9 8BL, Booth Ventures Waste (Midlands) Limited: environmental permit issued – EPR/WP3642YQ/A001
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:   Operator name: Booth Ventures Waste (Midlands) Limited Installation name: Sandown Quarry Landfill Permit number: EPR/WP3642YQ/A001  "
